# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Validate input
        run: |
          if [[ -z "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" ]]; then
            echo "Build script input is required."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run custom build script
        run: |
          # Ensure the script is safe to execute
          if [[ "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]+$ ]]; then
            ./scripts/${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }} 
          else
            echo "Invalid build script name."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Deploy application
        run: |
          # Ensure deployment command is safe
          if [[ "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]+$ ]]; then
            ./deploy/${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}
          else
            echo "Invalid deployment command."
            exit 1
          fi

    env:
      SECRET_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SECRET_TOKEN }}
